steps: Go to https://developers.docusign.com and sign up for a free developer account
Log in to the DocuSign developer sandbox at https://admindemo.docusign.com
Navigate to Settings > Apps and Keys (or go directly to https://admindemo.docusign.com/apps-and-keys)
Enter an app name and click 'Create App'
Under 'Authentication', add a Redirect URI for your application
Click 'Add Secret Key' to generate a client secret — copy it immediately
Note your Integration Key (this is your client_id) from the app settings page

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Integration Key (Client ID)
credential_fields.description: Your DocuSign app's Integration Key, found on the Apps and Keys page.

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: The secret key generated for your DocuSign app. Only shown once at creation.

notes: Free developer sandbox account available at https://developers.docusign.com
Sandbox uses different base URLs: account-d.docusign.com for OAuth, demo.docusign.net for API calls
Production apps require going live through the DocuSign Go-Live process
Client secret is shown only once — copy it when generated
DocuSign also supports JWT Grant authentication for server-side integrations (no user interaction required)
